releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Better Plugins Manager 1.0.4

### 新增
- 新增插件列表批量编辑模式。
  - 支持选择当前筛选列表中的插件。
  - 支持批量设置/清除分组。
  - 支持批量添加、移除、清空标签。
  - 支持批量设置延迟启动。
  - 支持批量启用/禁用插件，并在危险操作前确认。
- 新增更完整的版本选择弹窗。
  - 可查看 GitHub Release 版本列表。
  - 显示当前安装版本、版本数量、正式版/预发布标记。
  - 支持切换到指定 Release 版本。

### 优化
- 优化 GitHub Release 版本获取逻辑。
  - 每页请求数量从 50 提升到 100。
  - 支持分页获取，避免仓库 Release 较多时只能看到前一部分版本。
- 优化插件版本点击行为，现在会解析仓库来源并拉取完整版本列表后再打开版本选择弹窗。
- 优化分组/标签编辑弹窗。
  - 增加统计信息、使用数量、已选择/已分配/系统标签状态。
  - 新建分组/标签时提供颜色、ID、名称输入和实时预览。
- 优化插件列表空状态，筛选无结果时显示明确提示。
- 优化分组标签在插件卡片中的交互，可直接点击已有分组标签切换分组。
- 更新中英文文案，补充批量编辑、版本选择、分组/标签编辑相关翻译。
- 大幅调整相关界面样式，改善桌面端和移动端的布局、按钮、弹窗和列表可读性。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## v1.0.2

### 新增
- 新增插件总览双列显示模式，可在样式设置中选择列表或双列布局。
- 优化插件管理页布局编辑体验，将列表布局相关能力整合进编辑模式。
- 筛选器新增“包含 / 排除”逻辑，支持更灵活地按状态、分组、标签和延迟配置筛选插件。

### 优化
- 调整插件管理页布局工具的展示逻辑，使排序、分割线和隐藏管理操作更集中。
- 增加赞助入口，支持在插件市场信息和 README 中展示作者支持链接。

### 修复
- 修复插件重载相关问题。
- 修复下拉列表排序异常。
- 修复下拉列表样式叠加问题。
- 修复版本号与发布元数据不一致的问题。

### 说明
- 本版本包含多库共享相关的内部代码准备，但当前尚未作为正式入口开放。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.0.1

### 新增

- 新增“打开插件市场”通用工具，可从插件管理器工具栏快速打开 Obsidian 官方插件市场。
- 设置页新增“主页面”配置项，可自定义插件卡片功能显示位置：
  - 展示在插件卡片上
  - 收纳到右键菜单 / 更多菜单
- 支持配置的主页面功能包括：检查更新、下载更新、单次启动、重启插件、隐藏插件、笔记、快捷键、复制 ID、打开仓库、打开设置、打开目录、删除插件。

### 改进

- 优化插件卡片显示，新增启用 / 禁用 / 管理器状态标签。
- 插件版本信息支持点击获取远程版本并打开更新下载窗口。
- 有笔记的插件会显示笔记图标，点击可直接打开笔记编辑器。
- 优化桌面端右键菜单和移动端更多菜单，菜单项会根据主页面配置动态显示。
- 重做插件笔记编辑窗口：
  - 显示插件信息、分组、标签数和字符数
  - 支持自动保存
  - 显示保存状态：待保存、保存中、已保存、保存失败
- 重做卸载插件确认窗口：
  - 显示目标插件信息
  - 明确卸载影响
  - 增加卸载中的忙碌状态，避免重复操作
- 补充中文、英文及其他语言的相关文案。
- 优化插件卡片、笔记弹窗、卸载弹窗、主页面设置项等界面样式。

### 修复

- 修复 `1.0.1` 标签构建时 `querySelector<HTMLButtonElement>` 引发的 TypeScript 错误。
- 修正 `manifest.json`、`package.json`、`versions.json` 版本号为 `1.0.1`。

### 维护

- `1.0.1` 标签已重新指向修复后的提交，确保标签构建使用通过验证的代码。

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Better Plugins Manager 1.0.0

### 中文更新日志

相比 `0.4.3`，`1.0.0` 是一次主要功能更新，重点增强了 GitHub 安装来源、配置迁移、插件管理布局、Ribbon 管理和整体界面体验。

#### 主要更新

- 新增“导入 / 导出”功能，可在不同库之间迁移 BPM 配置。
- 新增 GitHub 插件 / 主题安装来源管理。
- 安装 GitHub 插件 / 主题时支持选择 Release 版本。
- 新增来源订阅，可检查更新、重装、固定版本、跟随最新版和自动更新。
- 新增插件列表自定义排序和分割线布局。
- 将 Ribbon 功能编排整合到插件管理器页面中。
- 新增内嵌式插件冲突排查面板。
- 新增加入 QQ 群入口，方便用户咨询问题。
- 重构插件管理器顶部工具栏，GitHub、教程、QQ 群、设置入口现在会在所有 Tab 中显示。

#### 功能增强

- 导入 / 导出：
  - 支持导出插件、主题、插件配置、分组、标签、延迟、布局、来源和工作区设置。
  - 支持导入配置包，并可按需应用配置。
  - 支持从导入包下载缺失插件 / 主题。
  - 支持单独导入插件 `data.json` 配置。

- GitHub 安装与来源：
  - 支持从 GitHub 仓库安装插件或主题。
  - 支持读取 Release 列表并选择版本。
  - 支持把安装仓库记录为来源订阅。
  - 支持来源页统一管理、检查更新、更新全部可更新项。
  - 支持固定 tag 或跟随最新版本。
  - 新增安装历史记录。

- 插件管理：
  - 支持插件列表自定义排序。
  - 支持添加分割线。
  - 改进隐藏插件管理。
  - 改进插件更新状态展示和单插件更新操作。
  - 改进批量启用 / 禁用逻辑。

- Ribbon 管理：
  - Ribbon 编排改为由 BPM 运行时数据驱动，不再写入 Obsidian 原生 workspace 配置。
  - 改进 Ribbon 同步、隐藏和重置行为。
  - 改进 Ribbon 拖拽隐藏和运行时样式应用。

- 冲突排查：
  - 新增插件冲突排查页面。
  - 支持保存排查状态，关闭窗口或重启后可恢复进度。
  - 优化排查过程和结果展示。

#### 体验优化

- 优化 GitHub Release 获取逻辑：
  - 支持预发布版本识别。
  - 支持 Release 更新说明展示。
  - 增加短时间缓存，减少 API 请求。
  - 改进仓库地址解析。
  - 改进 GitHub 限流和错误提示。
  - 支持 GitHub API Token。

- 优化设置页：
  - 基础设置按功能分组。
  - 新增来源启动检查更新。
  - 新增来源自动更新开关。
  - 多语言补充 GitHub Token 相关文案。

- 优化界面：
  - 大幅刷新桌面端和移动端界面样式。
  - 优化插件卡片、来源卡片、导入导出卡片、标签 / 分组编辑器和排查页面。
  - 优化移动端顶部和底部操作区。
  - 统一所有 Tab 下的工具栏入口和排序。

#### 修复与调整

- 修复 `1.0.0` 版本信息问题。
- 修复 `versions.json` 中最低 Obsidian 版本记录。
- 修复多个 Ribbon 同步和隐藏状态边界问题。
- 改进迁移逻辑，迁移任务现在按版本执行并支持重复运行保护。
- 移除旧的 Markdown 导出监听逻辑，改由新的配置包导入 / 导出功能替代。
- 移除旧分享弹窗相关文件。
- 旧版 `EXPORT_DIR` 字段仅保留用于兼容和迁移。

---

### English Changelog

Compared with `0.4.3`, `1.0.0` is a major feature update focused on GitHub installation sources, transfer workflows, plugin layout management, Ribbon management, and overall UI polish.

#### Highlights

- Added a new Import / Export workflow for transferring BPM setup between vaults.
- Added GitHub plugin/theme source management.
- Added GitHub Release version selection during installation.
- Added tracked sources with update checks, reinstall, fixed-version mode, latest mode, and optional auto-update.
- Added custom plugin list ordering and separators.
- Integrated Ribbon management into the manager page.
- Added an embedded plugin conflict troubleshooting panel.
- Added a QQ group support entry.
- Reworked the toolbar so GitHub, tutorial, QQ group, and settings are visible across all tabs.

#### New Features

- Import / Export:
  - Export plugins, themes, plugin configs, groups, tags, delays, layouts, sources, and workspace settings.
  - Import transfer packages with configurable options.
  - Download missing plugins/themes from imported packages.
  - Selectively import plugin `data.json` configs.

- GitHub installation and sources:
  - Install plugins or themes from GitHub repositories.
  - Fetch and select Release versions before installation.
  - Track installed repositories as source subscriptions.
  - Manage sources from a dedicated source page.
  - Check all sources for updates and update all available targets.
  - Support fixed tag mode and latest-release mode.
  - Added install history.

- Plugin management:
  - Added custom plugin ordering.
  - Added layout separators.
  - Improved hidden plugin management.
  - Improved plugin update status display and per-plugin update actions.
  - Improved bulk enable/disable behavior.

- Ribbon management:
  - Ribbon layout is now driven by BPM runtime data instead of writing Obsidian workspace config.
  - Improved Ribbon sync, hide, and reset behavior.
  - Improved drag-to-hide behavior and runtime style application.

- Troubleshooting:
  - Added an embedded troubleshooting page.
  - Troubleshooting state can be restored after closing or restarting.
  - Improved troubleshooting flow and result display.

#### Improvements

- Improved GitHub Release fetching:
  - Prerelease awareness.
  - Release note display.
  - Short-lived cache to reduce API requests.
  - Better repository URL normalization.
  - Better GitHub rate-limit and error handling.
  - Optional GitHub API Token support.

- Improved settings:
  - Reorganized basic settings into clearer sections.
  - Added startup source update checks.
  - Added source auto-update option.
  - Added GitHub Token copy across locales.

- Improved UI:
  - Major desktop and mobile UI refresh.
  - Better plugin cards, source cards, transfer cards, tag/group editors, and troubleshooting views.
  - Improved mobile header and footer actions.
  - Unified toolbar entries and ordering across all tabs.

#### Fixes and Changes

- Fixed `1.0.0` version metadata.
- Fixed the minimum Obsidian version entry in `versions.json`.
- Fixed several Ribbon sync and hidden-state edge cases.
- Improved migration handling with version-aware, idempotent migrations.
- Removed the old Markdown export watcher workflow in favor of the new transfer package workflow.
- Removed old share modal files.
- Kept the legacy `EXPORT_DIR` field only for compatibility and migration.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.4.3 更新日志

- 修复延迟菜单不被渲染的bug
- 把bpm面板最上方的设置按钮放到了最右侧，这样更符合用户常识
- 优化了翻译

---

0.4.3 Changelog

- Fixed a bug where the delayed menu was not rendering
- Moved the settings button at the top of the BPM panel to the far right, making it more intuitive for users
- Optimized translations

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.4.2 更新日志

- 设置添加一个选项，自动接管所有新插件，这样每次打开 Obsidian 时就不会弹出任何提示
- 现在增加了一个预设tag“bpm 忽略”，用户可以把这个tag赋予插件，使它们不受bpm控制，被赋予此tag的插件无法由bpm启停、延迟启动
- 修复移动端ribbon排序功能失效的bug
- 重构ribbon排序，用户可以直接在ribbon区上下拖动排序ribbon图标，并且可以把ribbon图标拖动到Obsidian外以实现隐藏ribbon图标。如果需要重新显示图标，可以在bpm面板中找到被隐藏的ribbon图标

---

0.4.2 Changelog

- Added an option in settings to automatically take over all new plugins, so no prompts will pop up every time you open Obsidian.
- Introduced a preset tag called "bpm ignore." Users can assign this tag to plugins to exempt them from bpm control. Plugins with this tag cannot be started, stopped, or delayed by bpm.
- Fixed a bug where the ribbon sorting feature wasn't working on mobile.
- Revamped ribbon sorting: users can now drag ribbon icons up or down directly in the ribbon area to reorder them. You can also drag ribbon icons outside of Obsidian to hide them. To show a hidden icon again, find it in the bpm panel.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.4.1 更新日志

- 支持ribbon显隐/排序以避免[bpm接管插件启动后导致的ribbon排序错乱问题](https://github.com/eondrcode/obsidian-manager/issues/58)，使用说明见[readme](https://github.com/eondrcode/obsidian-manager?tab=readme-ov-file#-customize-ribbon-bar-)

---

0.4.1 Changelog

- Added support for showing/hiding and reordering the ribbon to prevent [ribbon order issues caused by bpm taking over plugin startup](https://github.com/eondrcode/obsidian-manager/issues/58). For usage instructions, see the [readme](https://github.com/eondrcode/obsidian-manager?tab=readme-ov-file#-customize-ribbon-bar-).

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.4.0更新日志

- 增加功能“排查插件冲突”，可以使用bpm面板上方按钮或命令启动，采用二分法排查插件冲突，支持“单插件”或“双插件”情况，无法应付三个及以上插件冲突的情况。完成排查后可恢复排查前的插件启用情况，还能生成一篇插件排查情况笔记
- 启动时会检测是否存在不受bpm控制的插件，避免出现bug
---

0.4.0 ChangeLog

- Added the "Plugin Conflict Troubleshooting" feature. You can start it using the button at the top of the BPM panel or via a command. It uses a binary search method to identify plugin conflicts and supports both "single-plugin" and "dual-plugin" scenarios. It cannot handle conflicts involving three or more plugins. After troubleshooting, you can restore the plugin activation state to what it was before the check, and it can also generate a troubleshooting report note.
- On startup, it now checks for any plugins not controlled by BPM to prevent potential bugs.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.3.8更新日志

- 现在面板和导出的笔记中会包含better plugins manager自身，但是不能通过面板或者笔记禁用自身（可以使用分组命令禁用自身）
- 优化UI，现在桌面端与移动端UI单独设计，不再复用
---

0.3.8 Changelog

- The panel and exported notes now include the Better Plugins Manager itself, but you can't disable it through the panel or notes (you can use group commands to disable it).
- UI improvements: The desktop and mobile UIs are now designed separately and no longer share the same design.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.3.7更新日志：
- 考虑到`bpm_ro_updated`属性会频繁更新，导致最近笔记等插件失效，0.3.6版本开始停用这个属性
- 修复当插件数较多时，`重载插件`按钮失效的问题
- “筛选持久化”选项可以记住上次的搜索了
- 打开插件后，对应的设置按钮会自动出现，不用再手动刷新了
- 增加功能：点击版本号可以下载不同版本，用于快速切换插件版本（如果从高版本切换至低版本，可能会出现兼容性问题，用户需要自己承担风险，建议降级版本前记录相关设置，降级后删除对应插件的data.json并手动配置）
- 给面板增加了滚动条，方便用户快速滚动

0.3.7 Changelog:  
- The `bpm_ro_updated` attribute has been disabled starting from version 0.3.6, as frequent updates to this attribute were causing recent notes and other plugins to stop working.  
- Fixed an issue where the "Reload Plugins" button would fail when there were many plugins installed.  
- The "Filter Persistence" option now remembers your last search.  
- When you open a plugin, its settings button will now appear automatically—no need to manually refresh anymore.  
- New feature: Click the version number to download different versions, allowing quick switching between plugin versions. (Note: Switching from a higher version to a lower one may cause compatibility issues. Users assume any risks involved. It's recommended to back up your settings before downgrading, then delete the plugin's `data.json` file and reconfigure manually after the downgrade.)  
- Added a scrollbar to the panel for easier and quicker scrolling.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.3.6更新日志：
- 补充了部分文案缺失的i18n
- 修复了当标签过长导致面板部分内容被截断的问题
---
0.3.6 Changelog:
- Added i18n for some missing text content
- Fixed an issue where overly long labels caused parts of the panel to be cut off

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
0.3.5更新日志：
- 修复搜索UI异常
- 在BPM面板中右键单击插件可以对单个插件检测更新
- 现在只会在下载页面中安装插件时才添加`bpm install`标签，便于用户筛选手动安装的插件
- 增加可选功能：启动时检测全部插件更新
- 修复因为监控笔记变动导致的面板闪烁问题
- 修复因为开关插件、退出编辑模式导致的页面闪烁
- 修复无法打开插件对应目录的bug

0.3.5 ChangeLog:
- Fixed abnormal search UI
- Right-click on a plugin in the BPM panel to check for updates for that single plugin
- The `bpm install` tag is now only added when installing plugins from the download page, making it easier for users to filter manually installed plugins
- Added optional feature: Check for updates for all plugins on startup
- Fixed panel flickering caused by monitoring note changes
- Fixed page flickering caused by toggling plugins or exiting edit mode
- Fixed bug where the plugin's corresponding directory could not be opened

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
fix:  修复开关插件会导致面板闪烁的问题
---
fix:  Resolved the issue where toggling plugins caused the panel to flicker.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zenozero-dev/obsidian-manager/compare/0.3.2...0.3.3

---

- fix: 修复“跳转到插件项目地址页面404“的bug
- feat: 插件更新检测，支持官方市场下载/bpm安装/手动安装并添加插件地址三种来源
- feat: 检测到更新后可以下载插件，支持手动选择版本
- pref: 优化UI

---

- fix: Fixed the bug where "jumping to the plugin project address page resulted in a 404 error."
- feat: Added plugin update detection, supporting three sources: official marketplace downloads, BPM installation, and manual installation with plugin address addition.
- feat: After detecting updates, plugins can be downloaded, with support for manually selecting versions.
- pref: Optimized the UI.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zenozero-dev/obsidian-manager/compare/0.3.1...0.3.2

---

将bpm_rw_name改为bpm_ro_name：因为如果name属性可写，当用户在笔记中修改name属性后，文件名不变，会导致重复创建笔记。

现在只允许用户在bpm面板中修改name。

如果是从老版本升级上来的用户，插件会自动更新属性。

Change `bpm_rw_name` to `bpm_ro_name`: If the name attribute is writable, when a user modifies the name property in a note, the file name remains unchanged, which could lead to duplicate note creation.

Now, users are only allowed to modify the name within the BPM panel.

For users upgrading from older versions, the plugin will automatically update the properties.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zenozero-dev/obsidian-manager/compare/0.3.0...0.3.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* 更新了一大波功能 by @dangehub in https://github.com/zenozero-dev/obsidian-manager/pull/50

## New Contributors
* @dangehub made their first contribution in https://github.com/zenozero-dev/obsidian-manager/pull/50

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/zenozero-dev/obsidian-manager/compare/0.2.0...0.3.0

---

增加了大量功能与优化：
- [x] 集成brat
- [x] 修复列表/标签计数无法实时显示的bug
- [x] 增加打开对应插件仓库的按钮
- [x] 将配置导出为笔记以兼容base视图，需要在设置中配置【插件信息导出目录】后使用
- [x] 进入编辑模式后，给面板周围增加颜色提醒
- [x] 自动彩虹标签

---

Added a lot of features and improvements:  
- [x] Integrated brat  
- [x] Fixed the bug where list/tag counts couldn't be displayed in real-time  
- [x] Added a button to open the corresponding plugin repository  
- [x] Export configurations as notes for compatibility with base view (requires setting up the 【Plugin Info Export Directory】 in settings)  
- [x] Added color reminders around the panel after entering edit mode  
- [x] Automatic rainbow tags

releases.author: eondrcode

- 新增 当打开设置的时候不再关闭页面
